title: Gooey Citrusy Russian Falafel Skillet
description: A keto-friendly, citrusy twist on traditional Russian cuisine, featuring crispy falafel in a gooey, cheesy stir-fry. This cozy dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.

ingredients.name: Russian cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded, such as suluguni or mozzarella

instructions: Prepare the falafel mix according to the package instructions, using low-carb ingredients.
In a large oven-safe skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked falafel to the skillet, stirring to combine with the onion and mushroom mixture.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the lemon juice mixture over the falafel mixture, stirring to combine.
Top the skillet with the shredded Russian cheese and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and gooey.
